overview: MKJC Scholarship Exam Portal — a bilingual (English/Tamil) student registration and exam management platform with an online form builder tool for designing web forms with live CSS editing and code export.
features: Bilingual student registration and quiz system
Admin dashboard with question management, exam creation, and SMS integration
Online Form Builder — design forms with drag-and-drop controls, live CSS editor, and HTML export
Custom exam creation with auto-generated IDs
Fast2SMS integration for student credential delivery
